name: cliproxy-image-cli
description: Codex-native CLI for generating and editing images through the local Codex OpenAI configuration.

scripts.test: node -e "const { execFileSync } = require('node:child_process'); const checks = [['bin/cliproxy-image-cli.js', '--help'], ['bin/cliproxy-image-cli.js', 'generate', '--help'], ['bin/cliproxy-image-cli.js', 'edit', '--help']]; for (const args of checks) execFileSync(process.execPath, args, { stdio: 'ignore' });"

author: silarty666@gmail.com
